name: quicklinks
description: User-curated website shortcuts (URL + favicon). Managed in Settings → Quicklink; surfaced in the dock, Launchpad, mobile grid, Today widget and a dedicated window. Opening one pops a new native browser tab. The shell reads the list via the injected useQuickLinks capability.
notes: Pure client-side. The quicklinks store (lib/quicklinks) persists to localStorage; os-shell adapts it to the appshell useQuickLinks capability so appshell + its feature slices carry no host dependency.
